cmd.bg:
br=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo detached)
out=$(git status --porcelain=v2 --branch 2>/dev/null)
d=$(printf '%s\n' "$out" | grep -cvE '^#')
ab=$(printf '%s\n' "$out" | sed -n 's/^# branch\.ab //p')
a=${ab%% *}; b=${ab##* }; a=${a#+}; b=${b#-}
s=""
[ "${d:-0}" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null && s="*$d"
[ "${a:-0}" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null && s="$s +$a"
[ "${b:-0}" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null && s="$s -$b"
s=${s# }
printf '%s%s' "$br" "${s:+/$s}"

cmd.cwd: python3 -c "import json,os;d=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_STATUSLINE_JSON') or '{}');w=(d.get('workspace') or {});p=w.get('current_dir') or d.get('cwd') or os.getcwd() or '';h=os.path.expanduser('~');print(('~'+p[len(h):]) if h and p.startswith(h) else p)"

cmd.model: python3 -c "import json,os;d=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_STATUSLINE_JSON') or '{}');m=d.get('model') or {};print(m.get('display_name') or m.get('id') or '')"

cmd.pct: python3 -c "import json,os;d=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_STATUSLINE_JSON') or '{}');p=(d.get('context_window') or {}).get('used_percentage') or 0;print('' if not p else round(p))"

cmd.lim: python3 -c "import json,os,time;d=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_STATUSLINE_JSON') or '{}');f=((d.get('rate_limits') or {}).get('five_hour') or {});p=f.get('used_percentage');r=f.get('resets_at');m=None if not r else (int(r)-int(time.time()))//60;e='' if not m or m<=0 else str(m)+'m' if m<60 else str(m//60)+'h';print('' if p is None else '%.0f%%'%p+(' '+e if e else ''))"

cmd.cost: python3 -c "import json,os;d=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_STATUSLINE_JSON') or '{}');c=(d.get('cost') or {}).get('total_cost_usd') or 0;print('' if c<0.005 else '%.2f'%c)"
